edgeTypes.label: AFFECTS
edgeTypes.description: Links an incident to the services it impacts

edgeTypes.label: DEPLOYED_TO
edgeTypes.description: Links a deployment to the service it updates

edgeTypes.label: DEPENDS_ON
edgeTypes.description: Links a service to another service it depends on, for blast radius analysis

edgeTypes.label: BLOCKED_BY
edgeTypes.description: Links a task to another task that must complete before it can start

edgeTypes.label: PART_OF
edgeTypes.description: Links a task to the sprint it belongs to

edgeTypes.label: RUNS_ON
edgeTypes.description: Links a service to the infrastructure or platform that hosts it
